_comment: Curated store overlay. Merged over each app's manifest by category (server). Edit this to categorize apps, localize their store copy, mark featured, and gate by region. Keys are app ids.

descriptions.en: Learn letters and numbers with 7 mini-games. Multilingual, with voice.
descriptions.it: Impara lettere e numeri con 7 mini-giochi. Multilingua, con voce.
descriptions.es: Aprende letras y números con 7 minijuegos. Multilingüe, con voz.
descriptions.fr: Apprends les lettres et les chiffres avec 7 mini-jeux. Multilingue, avec voix.
descriptions.de: Lerne Buchstaben und Zahlen mit 7 Minispielen. Mehrsprachig, mit Stimme.

descriptions.en: A colourful kids piano: rainbow keys and four instrument presets.
descriptions.it: Un pianoforte colorato per bambini: tasti arcobaleno e quattro strumenti.
descriptions.es: Un piano infantil colorido: teclas de arcoíris y cuatro instrumentos.
descriptions.fr: Un piano coloré pour enfants : touches arc-en-ciel et quatre instruments.
descriptions.de: Ein buntes Kinder-Klavier: Regenbogentasten und vier Instrumente.

descriptions.en: Stopwatch and countdown with an end beep. Big, tap-friendly digits.
descriptions.it: Cronometro e conto alla rovescia con beep finale. Cifre grandi, comode al tocco.
descriptions.es: Cronometro y cuenta atras con pitido final. Digitos grandes.
descriptions.fr: Chronometre et compte a rebours avec bip final. Grands chiffres.
descriptions.de: Stoppuhr und Countdown mit Signalton. Grosse Ziffern.

descriptions.en: Turn the screen into a flashlight. Colour presets and an SOS morse blink.
descriptions.it: Trasforma lo schermo in una torcia. Preset colore e lampeggio SOS in morse.
descriptions.es: Convierte la pantalla en una linterna. Colores y SOS en morse.
descriptions.fr: Transforme l'ecran en lampe torche. Couleurs et SOS en morse.
descriptions.de: Macht den Bildschirm zur Taschenlampe. Farben und SOS-Morsen.

descriptions.en: Angle-and-power artillery arcade. Tap to aim, release to fire.
descriptions.it: Arcade di artiglieria: mira con angolo e potenza, tocca e spara.

descriptions.en: Nucleo Tanks — the built-in two-tank duel demo.
descriptions.it: Nucleo Tanks — il duello a due carri incluso.

descriptions.en: Minimal SDK sample — prints and toasts through the host ABI.
descriptions.it: Esempio SDK minimo — stampa e toast tramite l'ABI host.

descriptions.en: Watchdog test app (deliberately wedges to exercise the kill path).
descriptions.it: App di test del watchdog (si blocca apposta per provare il kill).
